title: Preconception planning before pregnancy
excerpt: Folic acid, vaccines, health checks, and lifestyle changes before trying to conceive — Long Châu, CDC.
content:
## Why plan ahead?

Reduce neural tube defect risk, anemia, and optimize health before conception.

## Before trying

- **Folic acid** 400 mcg/day (or higher if prescribed).
- Medical, dental, blood pressure, and glucose checks.
- Update vaccines per schedule.
- Stop smoking and alcohol; healthy weight.

## Nutrition

Varied diet; limit high-mercury fish; iodine/iron if locally deficient (with advice).

## Once pregnant

Register antenatal care early; do not self-medicate.
